commands.review_summary:
The PR adds info-level Telegram outbound send success logs for text/media sends, tracks accepted threadless retries, and loads the OpenAI Codex external auth overlay for Codex plugin-harness runs with regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a source-level reproduction path: the branch adds focused tests for Telegram success-log emission/privacy and Codex auth overlay selection. I did not execute those tests in this read-only checkout.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed; with no blocking findings, this automerge-opted replacement PR should proceed through normal CI and mergeability gates.
